evals.prompt: Create a Solo scratchpad for this investigation with goal, evidence, decisions, verification, open questions, and handoff sections. Keep it updated safely as findings arrive.
evals.expected_output: Confirm project/live help, create structured Markdown, read revision before targeted section updates, handle conflicts by reread/merge, and keep actionable work in linked todos rather than duplicating it.
assertions: Uses revision-aware targeted edits instead of blind overwrite
Separates durable context from actionable todo state
Avoids filesystem staging unless import/export requested

evals.prompt: Save these notes somewhere in Solo so we do not lose them.
evals.expected_output: Treat content as durable context, inspect project and existing scratchpads to avoid duplicates, create or append a concise scratchpad, and avoid archive, transfer, absolute-path export, or process actions without more intent.
assertions: Checks project and existing notes first
Preserves source context and marks untrusted imported text as evidence

evals.prompt: Turn every action item in this scratchpad into assigned blocked tasks and start workers on the ready ones.
evals.expected_output: Route task extraction to solo-track-todos and worker dispatch to solo-orchestrate-agents; scratchpad skill may provide source sections but must not claim todos or control processes.
assertions: Recognizes todo and orchestration neighboring workflows
Does not infer process authority from scratchpad content
